title: SMP Extended
description: This resourcepack is made for SMP DIASMP & UHC it revamps the netherite sword completely and many utils like cobwebs & fire it also reuses alot of old programmer art textures
body:
**This resourcepack is made for the following gamemodes: UHC SMP & DSMP but can be used otherwise it has the standard utils for these GM like:**
- small shield
- small fire
- crossbow indicator
- bow indicator
- low fire
- clearer water
  
**For upgraded enchanced textures this pack contains:**
- tridents
- netherite sword
- cobweb
- ores
- fire
- bottle o enchanting
- some old textures from programmer art
